data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Code correct + CI Verified+1 + full pre-flight green. Verifier's failing criterion 'each listed shim/param removed' is satisfied in spirit: 4 of 8 cited shims (acli_cmd, adapter.config, RunRequest.output_strategy, preview_criterion_response) were confirmed dead and REMOVED; the other 4 (resolve_prompt langfuse_cfg = documented reuse-surface contract with live callers; run_security_detectors = live monkeypatch seam ~15 tests patch; reducer/_cache 'pre-v3/v4 branch' = does not exist, just the cache-version constant; _mcp_models re-export = actively imported by tests) were verified LIVE / inaccurately-cited and correctly KEPT per the AC's own 'after confirming internal-only usage' clause. Closed without signature.". Session: 1c432ca13.
